---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation for BridgeLink Webadmin
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

**Webadmin Build Number** *(required — found under "About BridgeLink" in the left navigation menu)*

<!-- Enter your build number here, e.g. 4.6.0-build.1234 -->

**Description**
Describe the documentation problem. For example: a help text is outdated, a menu item is undocumented, or instructions lead to an incorrect result.

**Location**
Where did you encounter the issue? (e.g. in-app tooltip, external docs page, README)

**Suggested Improvement**
If you have a suggestion for how to correct or improve the documentation, describe it here.
